bead.title: gemini.Runner: add CONTRACT-004 interface methods (separate quota and account cadences)
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-07A
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. gemini.Runner implements all four interfaces' methods
2. AuthSnapshot is the source of AccountSnapshot; AccountFreshness() returns 7 days; QuotaFreshness() returns 15 minutes
3. Tier facts (Flash / Flash Lite / Pro) live in QuotaStatus.Windows with distinguishing LimitID; no tier names in Detail
4. package gemini doc comment mirrors Supported* return values including per-tier LimitIDs
5. harnesstest.RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance all pass against &gemini.Runner{}
